reason: Docker environment has pre-built clickhouse binary from commit 622e2a52 (fixed) while workdir is checked out at 64b0a83c (buggy base). Behavioral tests via 'clickhouse local' always use the pre-built fixed binary and cannot discriminate nop (base) from gold (fix). Cannot compile sparseGramsImpl.h standalone as it has complex ClickHouse dependencies not available in the runtime image. Structural issue: test infra does not support behavioral testing against actual C++ source.
